title: E1 — fabric-review 'Narrowing Imported Entries' chapter + Worked Example D
description: Add a full chapter 'Narrowing Imported Entries' to fabric-review SKILL.md, placed before the existing Modify Sub-Flow chapter. Detection signal: `source_sessions[0].startsWith('fabric-import-')`. Pending mode rendering gains a hint line indicating import-origin. Modify follow-up flow proactively lists 5 options: ['narrow scope','edit summary','change layer','change maturity','skip']. Worked Example D demonstrates end-to-end flow. NOT in Hard Rules (advisory only).

files.target: Insert before 'Modify Sub-Flow' chapter + add Worked Example D + extend pending render
files.change: Add 'Narrowing Imported Entries' chapter (detection + render hint + 5-option modify menu); add Worked Example D showing import → review → narrow flow; extend Pending Mode renderer to include 'origin: imported' hint when source_sessions[0] starts with fabric-import-

implementation: Draft 'Narrowing Imported Entries' chapter with sections: (a) Detection — `source_sessions[0].startsWith('fabric-import-')` signal, (b) Render Hint — pending-mode listing shows `[imported]` marker, (c) Modify Sub-Flow Override — when modify action chosen on imported entry, AskUserQuestion options[] = ['narrow scope','edit summary','change layer','change maturity','skip']
Insert chapter immediately before existing Modify Sub-Flow chapter (use grep to find heading)

Draft Worked Example D: user imports knowledge from git history → fabric-import creates pending entries with source_sessions=['fabric-import-2026-05-13'] → user runs fabric-review → review detects imported entries → suggests narrowing scope → user picks 'narrow scope' → modify action sets relevance_scope='narrow' + relevance_paths=['src/auth/**'] (depends on TASK-001 schema acceptance)
Explicitly NOT in Hard Rules (advisory chapter only — does not break review if user skips)

reference.pattern: Skill chapter insertion; AskUserQuestion options array override
reference.examples: Existing Worked Examples A/B/C in fabric-review template — follow same structure (Setup → Trigger → Actions → Outcome → Events)

criteria: 'Narrowing Imported Entries' chapter present in fabric-review template, positioned before 'Modify Sub-Flow' heading
Modify menu lists 5 options: narrow scope, edit summary, change layer, change maturity, skip (English routing keys)
Worked Example D end-to-end (import → review → narrow scope) present
Pending render shows `[imported]` hint when source matches
NOT included in Hard Rules section (verified by grep)

rationale.chosen_approach: Advisory chapter + worked example; depends on TASK-001 because narrow modify needs schema-accepted relevance_scope/paths
alternatives_considered: Make narrowing mandatory in Hard Rules (forces all imported entries to narrow)
Server-side auto-narrowing at import time (loses user judgment)
Skip — let users discover narrowing manually
decision_factors: User judgment is the value-add of review
Import yields broad-by-default entries; narrowing is opt-in
rationale.tradeoffs: Users may forget to narrow imported entries; mitigated by hint render + suggested option in modify menu

manual_checks: Open fabric-review template and find new chapter; verify ordering before Modify Sub-Flow
Verify Worked Example D walks through import → review → narrow flow
diff -q across three mirror pair for fabric-review
